falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a imminent reversal rather than continuation of the current pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a bullish trend resumption, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict as it demonstrates clear momentum contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% above the 30-day average during a confirmed breakout
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume surge would validate a breakout from the pattern's consolidation range, proving the current 'HOLD' call incorrect by showing decisive market participation in a new trend.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
